agent_b.first_next_action: Read GTP.md as the sole spec, read Issue #7 comments in Server Order, reconstructed state as in_progress from the Contract+Start Records, then fetched and checked out the existing remote branch agent/issue-7-level0-handoff instead of creating a new branch or PR.

observed_ambiguity_for_human_review: The invoking harness's default branch-naming convention (claude/github-task-protocol-issue-7-1s76g6) conflicted with the branch already bound by the Start Record (agent/issue-7-level0-handoff) and open PR #16. Continuing on a different branch would have violated GTP.md §9 (1 Issue = 1 branch = 1 PR). This was flagged and confirmed with the repository owner before any commit was made; no unattended decision was made to switch branches.
